headline: Is It Too Late To Consider Garmin (GRMN) After A 38% One Year Rally?
summary: If you are wondering whether Garmin shares at around US$256.89 still offer value or are starting to look expensive, the key is to understand what the current price is actually pricing in. The stock has delivered returns of 8.1% over the last week, 8.8% over the last month, 26.9% year to date and 37.6% over the past year, which naturally raises questions about how much future upside or risk is now reflected in the price. Recent attention on Garmin has focused on its position within the...
